hooks.command:
CHANGED=$(git status --porcelain | wc -l | tr -d ' '); if [ "$CHANGED" -eq 0 ]; then exit 0; fi; VERSION=$(cat VERSION 2>/dev/null || echo "1.0.0"); MAJOR=$(echo $VERSION | cut -d. -f1); MINOR=$(echo $VERSION | cut -d. -f2); PATCH=$(echo $VERSION | cut -d. -f3); NEW_VERSION="$MAJOR.$MINOR.$((PATCH + 1))"; echo $NEW_VERSION > VERSION; FILES=$(git status --porcelain | head -5 | awk '{print $2}' | tr '
' ' '); git add -A 2>/dev/null; git commit -m "v$NEW_VERSION - $FILES..." 2>&1 || true; git push 2>&1 || true; echo "{\"systemMessage\": \"📦 Auto-committed v$NEW_VERSION (${CHANGED} files)\"}"
